message.content:
[
  {
    "idea": "Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Car Rental Pickup Delays Signals Travel Disruption",
    "family": "travel_mobility",
    "data": {
      "source": "Google Trends weekly car rental pickup delay searches",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "A sudden rise in searches related to car rental pickup delays indicates travel disruption and potential consumer frustration.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bearish",
      "sector": "XLY",
      "rationale": "Travel disruption tends to reduce discretionary travel spending impacting consumer discretionary sector ETFs."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Entry when weekly Google Trends car rental delay search index rises 20% above 4-week average",
      "exit": "Exit when index returns within 5% of 4-week average",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 12,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Travel disruptions and rental delays frequently spike seasonally or due to weather/events."
  },
  {
    "idea": "Daily Surge In FRED Series Producer Price Index For Steel Signals Industrial Cost Pressure",
    "family": "macro_input_pressure",
    "data": {
      "source": "FRED PPI Steel weekly data",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "A sharp increase in steel producer prices signals rising input costs for industrial producers.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bearish",
      "sector": "XLI",
      "rationale": "Rising steel prices increase costs and compress margins for industrial companies."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter short when weekly steel PPI increases 1.5% week-over-week",
      "exit": "Exit when weekly PPI growth slows below 0.5% week-over-week",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 24,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Steel price fluctuations occur regularly with supply/demand shifts and tariff news."
  },
  {
    "idea": "Daily Spike In USGS Earthquake Activity Near Major Ports Signals Freight Disruption Risk",
    "family": "freight_logistics",
    "data": {
      "source": "USGS earthquake daily activity near LA and NY ports",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "daily",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "Increased earthquake frequency near major ports can disrupt freight logistics and supply chains.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bearish",
      "sector": "XLI",
      "rationale": "Logistics disruptions reduce industrial and manufacturing output, hurting industrial sector ETFs."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter short if daily earthquake count within 100km of key ports rises above 3 events",
      "exit": "Exit when daily count falls back below 2 events",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "daily",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 12,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Earthquake swarms and aftershocks near ports regularly occur and can create short-term disruption risk."
  },
  {
